transcript: This is the greatest surf spot inside the best province in Canada that you'll never visit for one reason. Tofino, located in British Columbia, is paradise on Earth. Situated on Vancouver Island, this place is the perfect destination for nature and ocean lovers. The water is extremely cold and filled with orcas and other insane animals. Just try not to get too close to them.
